page.title: Patient Insight
page.subtitle: A simple summary of the patient, key notes, and possible connections. No diagnosis. No session plan.
page.disclaimer: This insight uses saved patient information and session notes. It is written in simple words so the patient can understand it.

pdf.disclaimer: This insight puts patient information in simple words. It is not a diagnosis. It is not a session plan. Please talk with the clinic if you have questions.

panel.title: AI Insights
panel.noPatternText: The system will show simple trends when more data is available.
panel.keepUpdatedText: Add notes after the next interaction so the dashboard can guide the team.

deleteButton.confirm: Delete this case? It leaves the profile so you can generate a new one. (Reversible.)

reviewPanel.title: Simple insight review
reviewPanel.subtitle: Review the insight, approve it, or request changes. Technical details stay hidden unless needed.
reviewPanel.resendNoContact: Patient has no email or phone on file
reviewPanel.updateErrorTitle: AI insight could not be updated.
reviewPanel.emptyText: Generate a first draft. It will stay in review until someone approves it.

reviewCard.summaryFallback: A short summary is ready for review.
reviewCard.reviewerNotesPlaceholder: Review notes (optional): click the 🎤 to dictate
reviewCard.sendOnApprove: Send the documents to the patient by email and WhatsApp on approval

patientPage.title: AI Insights
patientPage.channelSkipped: • {label}: not sent (patient has no {contact} on file)
patientPage.followupPrompt: Insight approved. Would you like to create a follow-up for this patient?
